mechanics.excerpt: Each type of armor has four ratings, corresponding to the four general damage types: melee_ ballistic, energy and explosive- Armor rated at 2/5/1/1 would function as AV against melee attacks against ballistic attacks_ and AV against energy and explosive attacks_ Effects of Fatigue Once the amount of Fatigue the character has suffered exceeds nis WIL; all of his Action Check target numbers increased by the amount of Fatigue he has suffered excess of his WIL For example character with WIL wno has suf- tered Fatigue would have +2 Modifier t0 all of his TNs_ The more Fatigue character suffers the more susceptible t0 being stunned knocked out and knocked down AIso the character becomes more susceptible wounding from unarmed attacks_ and nis Fatigue subtracted from Initiative .
